title: Cillit Bang Limescale and Grime, 750ml
features: Effective on limescale, soapscum, rust, dirt and grime
Makes surfaces water and dirt repellent, preventing staining
description: Product Description Spend less time cleaning with Cillit Bang! Our super effective foam removes 100% of stains* quickly removes limescale, soapscum, watermarks, dirt, grime and even rust from most common surfaces inside and outside your home. Our new formula makes surfaces water and dirt repellent, preventing stains from encrusting so cleaning is much faster next time!** *Tested on Limescale, Soapscum and Rust **vs. previous formula Ingredients Contains <5% Anionic Surfactant, Perfume Directions Directions: 1. Turn nozzle to 'on' position. 2. Always test on an inconspicuous area so you know the surface can handle the power. 3. Keep the bottle up right and at least 20cm away from the surface. Spray Turbo Foam directly onto the area to be cleaned and wipe around with sponge/cloth. 4. Do not leave for more than 5 mins. 5. Rinse thoroughly with water. 6. Revel in the results. 7. After use, rinse sponge/cloth with water. Safety Warning Caution: These surfaces can't handle Cillit Bang's Purposeful Purple Punch: All natural stone like marble, granite, brass, copper dominium and zinc plated metals, satinated fittings, linoleum, textiles and carpets, rubber, treated Wood floors, etched/matt glass Cillit Bang Power Cleaner Limescale and Shine. Contains Sulphamic acid, Oxalic acid and Alcohol, C9-C11 ethoxylated. Causes serious eye damage. Causes skin irritation. May be corrosive to metals. Keep out of reach of children. Wear eye/face protection. If medical advice is needed, have product container or label and hand. If in eyes: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do so. Continue rinsing. If eye irritation persists: Get medical advice/attention. If on skin: Wash with plenty of soap and water, If skin irritation occurs: Get medical advice/attention. For surfaces that come in contact with food, use only on non porous surfaces and rinse thoroughly with water. Do not mix with bleach, or other household products. If you have sensitive skin, we recommend you to wear gloves. Danger Manufacturer Contact Information Reckitt Benckiser, PO Box 4044, Slough, SL1 0NS, UK. See more
